age derive(age_bend = case(     age < 18, '0-17',     age < 35, '18-34',     age < 50, '35-49',     age < 65, '50-64',     '65+' )) ~> derivedColumn2

aggregate1 derive(insurance_tier = case( insurar == 'Humana', 'Premium',     insurar == 'UnitedHealthcare', 'Premium',     insurar == 'Aetna', 'Premium',     insurar == 'Medicare', 'Government',     insurar == 'Medicaid', 'Government',     isNull(insurar), 'Unknown',     'Standard' )) ~> derivedColumn5
